understanding.goal_understanding: The goal of the game was to navigate a grid-based puzzle, modify a carried piece's shape, color, and rotation using modifier tiles, so that it matches the requirements of one or more goal cells, then step onto those goal cells to complete all levels. Stamina management was also crucial, as running out of stamina would cost lives.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Each turn the player moves one tile in a cardinal direction, costing 1 stamina. Walls block movement and are listed as blocked_directions. Modifier tiles cycle the piece's shape (6 shapes), color (orange→blue→green→red→orange), or rotate it 90° clockwise. A goal cell activates only when the carried piece's shape, color, and rotation all match its requirements. Stepping onto an activated goal completes it. Completing all goals in a level advances to the next level. If stamina reaches 0, a life is lost and stamina resets to maximum; losing all lives ends the game.
